statement: In every magma, Equation 732 (`x = y * (y * ((z * z) * y))`) implies Equation 1969 (`x = (y * (z * x)) * (z * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0288
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op y (op (op z z) y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z x)) (op z w))
